decision_commentary: Legal review is thorough and well-structured. IP rights status clearly stated: Oficio Taller retains all IP; client receives site-specific build license — correct and unambiguous. Contract_flags is an empty array (no blocking issues). Three advisory notes: SEMARNAT clearance requirement, budget alignment clause recommendation, and RFC validation note. All three are project-specific and actionable — not generic. approval_status is 'approved_with_advisory' — clean approval with specific advisories rather than open flags. reviewed_by, review_date, and ip_rights_status all present. No auto-fail conditions triggered. State_sync scored 3 per simulated run note.
